content_body: What a beautiful cabin but God's beautiful creation dwarfs it all. The mountains, the sunrise, the sunset, the "smoke" on the mountains -- it was beautiful from morning until night. My husband and I had a wonderful three day getaway and left renewed and refreshed. The little town of Blue Ridge was quite a treat and we enjoyed talking with all the people who call this piece of Heaven on Earth home!
title: We Left Feeling Refreshed & Renewed!
